name: Berberine
summary: Decision-ready summary: Berberine is best framed for fasting glucose support; insulin resistance context; triglyceride/LDL support; safety screen: pregnancy; breastfeeding; diabetes medications; CYP/P-gp medication review.
description: Berberine supports blood sugar; lipids; metabolic with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
